default_behavior.checkpoint_compatibility: old checkpoints load because head absent unless flag enabled

losses.future_hypothesis_loss: default hypothesis-0 CE placeholder when enabled; weight default zero
losses.future_identity_belief_loss: cosine loss gated by semantic_entity_true_instance_confidence when nonzero weight
losses.future_semantic_embedding_loss: cosine loss to current semantic tokens when nonzero weight
losses.future_trace_coord_loss: existing coord/readout loss retained; report field reserved as 0 in new head loss block
losses.future_uncertainty_loss: diagnostic smooth-L1 to detached coord error when nonzero weight
losses.future_visibility_loss: BCE with fut_valid/token_mask targets when nonzero weight
